title: About LounGenie | Hospitality Innovation
excerpt: Learn how PoolSafe's LounGenie brings zero-upfront smart amenities to hospitality — designed, installed, and maintained for measurable F&B lifts.
content:
Built For Hospitality — Designed In North York, Installed Worldwide

LounGenie is a revenue-share smart cabana system by PoolSafe. We provide hardware, installation, and full maintenance so properties earn from Day 1.

Our Model

Zero upfront cost; we install and maintain the units and share in incremental F&B revenue. Fast deployments with no electrical trenching or permits in most configurations.

Design & Manufacturing

Commercial-grade aluminum construction, waterproof components, and customizable finishes to match property aesthetics.

Partners & Results

Trusted by global hospitality leaders; case studies show measurable increases in F&B revenue and guest satisfaction.

See Press & Case Studies
